source: candobro (Slack) — reconstructed from production database and event logs

metrics.label: Total tax documents in system
metrics.explain: Running total of all tax documents held in the system.

metrics.label: Client WhatsApp messages (cumulative)
metrics.explain: Cumulative inbound messages received from clients over WhatsApp (running total across the window).

metrics.label: Documents reviewed & status changed
metrics.explain: Tax documents reviewed and moved to a new status each day; the Jul 2 peak of 13,421 stands out against a typical few hundred per day.

metrics.label: Clients moved to completed filing (daily)
metrics.explain: Number of clients whose tax filing moved to "completed" status each day, derived from the day-over-day change in the cumulative quarter submitted/completed count (candobro was unavailable for a direct daily pull).

days.label: Jul 12
days.milestone: Weekend. No over-activations; pipeline unchanged over Sunday: 271 clients in file processing, 8 reviewing results, 12 awaiting final submission. 88,097 tax documents in system.

No over-activations today. NOTE: candobro re-scoped several metrics this run (taxDocs now counts only active billing/sales/purchase docs; migImp/migAct recounted), so today's values are not directly comparable to prior days. Migrant activation: 105 of 427 imported activated (25%); 322 imported not yet activated. Active Q2 tax-filing pipeline: 18 clients uploading documents, 231 files processing, 3 calculating drafts, 10 reviewing drafts, 9 awaiting final submission, 229 completed filing. Avg time from documents-finished-uploading (quarter over) to draft results presented for approval: 1.5 days. 54,483 tax documents in system.
